<!--
Thanks for contributing! Please make sure your PR meets the checklist below.
If anything doesn't apply, leave it unchecked or delete the line.
-->

## What does this PR do?

<!-- A short description of the change. Why is it needed? What does it change? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Tracker catalogue correction (wrong company, domain, severity, tier)
- [ ] New tracker / actor entry
- [ ] Library code change (matcher, scorer, types)
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / internal cleanup
- [ ] Dependency update

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds locally (`tsc` is clean)
- [ ] `npm test` passes (or no tests apply)
- [ ] If editing `src/actors/*.json`: schema shape preserved, sources cited
- [ ] If changing public API: exports in `package.json` and `types` updated
- [ ] Risk tiers and severities reflect GDPR reality, not vendor marketing

## Sources / evidence

<!-- For tracker data changes: link the privacy policy, network trace, or
     primary source that supports the correction. Secondary (third-party
     trackers-lists) are not sufficient on their own. -->

## Related issue

<!-- Link the issue this PR fixes, if any. "Fixes #123" auto-closes on merge. -->
Fixes #
